_note: hoop/v095 STORYBOARD — the single declarative source of progression. Each BEAT pins a marginal story step to a change in world state: `requires` (entry gate: prior beats + facts/items/rep) → the player works it → `completes_when` (the world-state delta that closes it) → optional `advances` (tier floor) + `marker` (where to point them) + `log`/`done` (the quest-log lines). EVERYTHING derives from this: the quest log, the map markers, tier advancement (board.js#tierFloors agrees with advance.js), NPC line-state (completed beats set facts dialogue can branch on), and the /storyboard/ director's-board endpoint. THE GROWTH RULE: a new step is one appended beat with requires:{beats:[prior]} — the log, the board, and the markers pick it up with no other change. completes_when uses the same shape as the engine's meetsState (facts/items/min_rep).

beats.title: Waking in Bay 14
beats.log: You woke in a reconstruction bay that isn't on any map. The Drift broker who found you is here — hear her out.
beats.done: Olo Vashti orientated you — and named Luna, who knows your name.
beats.reveals: Someone rebuilt you here, against a time they already knew. Luna knows your name; you don't.

beats.title: The mythograph that names you
beats.log: Olo said a Tabard terminal is posting something the regulars can't parse. Find one and read it.
beats.done: You read Luna's mythograph — and saw your own name in a notation you can't read.

marker.hint: read a Tabard terminal (the teal ▤ console)

beats.reveals: The Seven post a story's skeleton before its telling. This one's hero is you, marked and recognised — by the name only Luna knows.

beats.title: A reason Sevin believes
beats.log: You carry the notation now. Take it to Sevin at the industrial margin — she'll want a reason to open the rind.
beats.done: Sevin recognised the mark and opened the shaft. The way down — and on — is yours.

marker.hint: bring the notation to Sevin at the margin

beats.reveals: Orientation. The first chunk unseals — the Nave opens, and the rind waits below.

beats.title: The Curve
beats.log: You've been reading the Nave deeply. Someone's bound to say what no one says aloud — talk to whoever you meet next.
beats.done: A regular told you what the Nave won't: the sky-arc is the far side of the floor. You're inside something, and it moves.
beats.informed: Word's gone round that you've been reading the deep posts. A reading-room regular leans in, low: “You've seen enough of the Nave by now to notice what the rest of us won't say — the sky-arc up there is the far side of the floor you're standing on. We're inside something. And it's moving.”
beats.reveals: Revelation tier 2 — The Curve. Reached by lore-exposure (XP ≥ power 3), DELIVERED by the next person you talk to. The XP→informed→deeper-lore loop; the crowd's chatter deepens after.

beats.title: Into the rind
beats.log: Follow Sevin down the access shaft into the tunnel-rind.
beats.done: You descended. The sun-strip gave out to hull-glow; the walls carry the oldest layer of the mark.
beats.reveals: The descent proper — geography for chunk 2 (not built yet).

beats.title: The first reckoning
beats.log: (to come) The Continuants' trail ends here. A faction choice will shape the full descent.
beats.reveals: Here player decisions begin to matter — the bible's Investigation tier.
